title: THOR Cloud Lite — Nextron Systems Forensic Threat Hunting Platform
summary: THOR Cloud Lite is a cloud-based forensic scanning platform developed by Nextron Systems (a German cybersecurity company) used for on-demand endpoint investigations. It enables SOC and incident response teams to run remote campaigns across systems, collect forensic artifacts, detect malware traces using YARA/Sigma rules, and review centralized reports through a cloud dashboard. The platform operates in a non-real-time model, focusing on post-compromise analysis rather than continuous monitoring like traditional EDR systems. The free tier includes up to 30 scans per month per account.
